---
title: "About Me"
subtitle: "Carlotta Angiolillo"
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: LIN-139.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: X / twitter 
      href: https://x.com/carlottaang76
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/carlotta-angiolillo-88a711245/
---

Hi! I'm a recent graduate of Northwestern's Medill School of Journalism and a general assignment reporter at the Columbia Missourian.

At Northwestern, I had the privilege of learning about and doing many different types of journalism, including audio storytelling, data reporting, investigative work, community engagement and legal reporting. I was a reporter and editor for The Daily Northwestern, the student paper that served the campus community along with Evanston news.

Outside of journalism, I’m usually spending too much money at a local coffee shop, learning new guitar chords or catching up on the latest episode of Abbott Elementary.

You can reach me at lottangiol\@gmail.com or 832-728-7576.
